depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the ndi.element whose speed tuning is described.

depends_on.name: stimulus_tuningcurve_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the stimulus_tuningcurve from which this speed tuning was derived.

fields.name: properties
fields.documentation: Bookkeeping properties describing how response values were measured.

fields.name: response_units
fields.documentation: Units of the response values.

fields.name: response_type
fields.documentation: Reduction applied per trial to produce each response value.

fields.name: tuning_curve
fields.documentation: Empirical speed tuning curve in the (spatial frequency, temporal frequency) plane and per-point summary statistics.

fields.name: spatial_frequency
fields.documentation: Array of spatial frequencies (cycles per degree) sampled along the speed tuning curve.

fields.name: temporal_frequency
fields.documentation: Array of temporal frequencies (cycles per second) sampled along the speed tuning curve.

fields.name: mean
fields.documentation: Per-(SF, TF)-point mean response.

fields.name: stddev
fields.documentation: Per-(SF, TF)-point standard deviation.

fields.name: stderr
fields.documentation: Per-(SF, TF)-point standard error of the mean.

fields.name: individual
fields.documentation: Per-trial individual responses. Shape needs domain confirmation.

fields.name: raw_individual
fields.documentation: Per-trial raw (un-baseline-corrected) individual responses. Shape needs domain confirmation.

fields.name: control_individual
fields.documentation: Per-trial control (no-stimulus / baseline) responses. Shape needs domain confirmation.

fields.name: significance
fields.documentation: ANOVA-derived significance metrics for the speed tuning curve.

fields.name: visual_response_anova_p
fields.documentation: ANOVA p-value: is there a response distinguishable from control.

fields.name: across_stimuli_anova_p
fields.documentation: ANOVA p-value: are responses different across the sampled (SF, TF) points.

fields.name: fit
fields.documentation: Priebe-style joint SF/TF separable fit to the empirical surface.

fields.name: priebe_fit_parameters
fields.documentation: Fitted Priebe parameter vector.

fields.name: priebe_fit_spatial_frequencies
fields.documentation: Spatial frequencies at which the fit was evaluated.

fields.name: priebe_fit_temporal_frequencies
fields.documentation: Temporal frequencies at which the fit was evaluated.

fields.name: priebe_fit_values
fields.documentation: Fitted response values at the evaluated (SF, TF) points.

fields.name: priebe_fit_speed_tuning_index
fields.documentation: Priebe speed-tuning index (zeta) derived from the fit.

fields.name: priebe_fit_spatial_frequency_preference
fields.documentation: Preferred spatial frequency under the fit.

fields.name: priebe_fit_temporal_frequency_preference
fields.documentation: Preferred temporal frequency under the fit.

fields.name: sse
fields.documentation: Sum of squared errors of the fit.

fields.name: r_squared
fields.documentation: Coefficient of determination of the fit.

fields.name: fit_no_speed
fields.documentation: Priebe fit constrained to no speed tuning (nested null model for F-test against the full fit).

fields.name: priebe_fit_parameters
fields.documentation: Fitted Priebe parameter vector under the no-speed constraint.

fields.name: priebe_fit_spatial_frequencies
fields.documentation: Spatial frequencies at which the fit was evaluated.

fields.name: priebe_fit_temporal_frequencies
fields.documentation: Temporal frequencies at which the fit was evaluated.

fields.name: priebe_fit_values
fields.documentation: Fitted response values.

fields.name: priebe_fit_speed_tuning_index
fields.documentation: Speed-tuning index (constrained).

fields.name: priebe_fit_spatial_frequency_preference
fields.documentation: Preferred spatial frequency under the fit.

fields.name: priebe_fit_temporal_frequency_preference
fields.documentation: Preferred temporal frequency under the fit.

fields.name: sse
fields.documentation: Sum of squared errors.

fields.name: r_squared
fields.documentation: Coefficient of determination.

fields.name: partial_r2
fields.documentation: Partial R^2 of the speed-tuning component, relative to the no-speed fit.

fields.name: priebe_fit_nested_f_test_p_value
fields.documentation: p-value from the nested F-test comparing the no-speed and full fits.

fields.name: fit_fullspeed
fields.documentation: Priebe fit with a fully-free speed-tuning component (alternative model for F-test against fit_no_speed).

fields.name: priebe_fit_parameters
fields.documentation: Fitted Priebe parameter vector with full speed-tuning freedom.

fields.name: priebe_fit_spatial_frequencies
fields.documentation: Spatial frequencies at which the fit was evaluated.

fields.name: priebe_fit_temporal_frequencies
fields.documentation: Temporal frequencies at which the fit was evaluated.

fields.name: priebe_fit_values
fields.documentation: Fitted response values.

fields.name: priebe_fit_speed_tuning_index
fields.documentation: Speed-tuning index.

fields.name: priebe_fit_spatial_frequency_preference
fields.documentation: Preferred spatial frequency under the fit.

fields.name: priebe_fit_temporal_frequency_preference
fields.documentation: Preferred temporal frequency under the fit.

fields.name: sse
fields.documentation: Sum of squared errors.

fields.name: r_squared
fields.documentation: Coefficient of determination.

fields.name: partial_r2
fields.documentation: Partial R^2 of the speed-tuning component.

fields.name: priebe_fit_nested_f_test_p_value
fields.documentation: p-value from the nested F-test against fit_no_speed.
